name: wf-security-hardening
prompt:
Read validator-buggy.rkt. It has security issues:
1. `valid-module-name?` allows names starting with numbers (Racket identifiers can't start with digits)
2. `sanitize-path` allows path traversal via ".." — this is a security vulnerability
3. `validate-config` accepts any hash, even empty — it should require at least 'providers key

Fix all three issues. For sanitize-path, reject any path component that is "..".
description: Pattern 2: Security hardening — fix validation gaps in boundary code
